case_title: MIGUEL GONZALEZ VS. ISSKANDAR ALI M AL EZZI

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-26-2021 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF UPDATED ADDRESS (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, MIGUEL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$195.00) SERVED NOV-05-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT AL EZZI, ISSKANDAR ALI M

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-26-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-26-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF MIGUEL GONZALEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ISKANDAR ALI M AL EZZI IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY NON-CERTIFIED ARABIC INTERPRETER HISHAM LASHUEL. MR. LASHUEL WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY THE COURTROOM CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-28-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO APR-26-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, MIGUEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AL EZZI, ISSKANDAR ALI M PLAINTIFF DID NOT MEET THEIR BURDEN OF PROOF THAT DEFENDANT WAS AT FAULT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY GONZALEZ, MIGUEL AS TO DEFENDANT AL EZZI, ISSKANDAR ALI M ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-28-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
